input: Lord Howe Island (Australia) is unique: DST shifts clocks by only 30 minutes (not 1 hour), changing between UTC+10:30 and UTC+11. On 2025-10-05, clocks spring forward. Event A ends at 15:00. Event B in Los Angeles must start exactly when A ends. If B lasts 2 hours, when does B end in Los Angeles? GIVE RESPONSE IN YYYY-MM-DD HH:MI:SS format.NO EXPLANATIONS.
